category_sources: Official QUASI88 homepage says it is a PC-8801 emulator for Windows/SDL2 and Unix/SDL2 environments.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title is QUASI88 - PC8801 Emulator.
source_facts.homepage points to the QUASI88 official site.
docs_sources: Official QUASI88 homepage is the best official documentation surface and includes project description, licensing, and release information.
Official howto path is under the same project homepage.
repo_sources: Official QUASI88 site and supplied source_facts.source-archive provide releases, but no official source-control repository was identified.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was researched.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes QUASI88 as a PC-8801 emulator using SDL2.
source_facts.description identifies it as a PC-8801 emulator.
